name: Prosciutto Di Parma with Grilled Fresh Fig Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Prosciutto di Parma, sliced paper thin
1/2 pound arugula leaves, washed and spun dry, to yield 2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill or broiler.
2. Place the 12 fig halves cut side down on the grill and cook for 3 minutes. Remove and allow to cool.
3. In a mixing bowl, toss grilled figs, raw figs, rosemary, balsamic vinegar, Italian parsley, arugula, and extra virgin olive oil. Gently mix with hands so as not to break the figs.
4. Divide the paper-thin Prosciutto onto 4 plates.
5. Divide the fig salad and place on top of Prosciutto.
6. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
